api_info.description: SportsDataIO NCAA College Basketball (CBB) API providing scores, schedules, standings, team/player data, box scores, tournament brackets (March Madness), and betting odds.

conversion.notes: Built from SportsDataIO developer documentation and data dictionary. Covers scores, stats, odds sub-APIs under the CBB v3 umbrella. Tournament/March Madness data exposed via Game model fields (TournamentID, Bracket, Round, Seeds) and dedicated Tournament endpoint.
